title: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Flodesk?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Flodesk?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point ($11/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to Campaign Monitor is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
